|  | **1\. Directory Intelligence (Architect)** *Helping people build database-driven niche directories that rank on Google.*[https://gemini.google.com/gem/1M7ss0oGtjNtEBjnWoL0MbClImWzAgs2J?usp=sharing](https://gemini.google.com/gem/1M7ss0oGtjNtEBjnWoL0MbClImWzAgs2J?usp=sharing) |
|  | **2\. Apify Actor Builder (Engineer)**  *Paste your directory schema. Get a complete, ready-to-run Apify actor. This bot reads your field list and generates every file your data pipeline needs \- no Apify experience required.  This bot turns a directory schema into working code. Give it the .md output from the Directory Intelligence Bot. It returns a full Apify actor with Google Places enrichment, OpenAI content generation, and anti-thin validation built in.* [https://gemini.google.com/gem/1KUnprWbda90QuFLX6wyv81FYfqEWo8PQ?usp=sharing](https://gemini.google.com/gem/1KUnprWbda90QuFLX6wyv81FYfqEWo8PQ?usp=sharing) |
